title: Notice to Traders 34/22 Imports of Rice under Statutory Instrument 2020 No. 1432
body: "This notice explains the rules for the Rice quota for the period of 1 January 2022 to 31 December 2022 and how to apply for a licence. It also advises you of the quota amounts available in the May 2022 application window and details of the quantities available are given in Annex 1 of this notice. It also advises you of the quota amounts available in the May 2022 application window and details of the quantities available are given in Annex 1 of this notice. "

taxons.title: Import, export and distribution of food
